Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: The motion to strike is granted in part. The Court strikes the following sentence from paragraph 26 of the complaint: ¿Plaintiff seeks an order that the lease for the Apartment be returned to Mary and that Phillip¿s occupancy of the Apartment be terminated.¿ The unlawful detainer procedures are the exclusive mechanism to terminate a tenancy. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, 4/24/12.
